title: Smokejoy-Ginger Miso Glazed Pork Chops
description: A sweet and savory glaze made with smokejoy and miso adds depth to pan-seared pork chops, served with a side of pickled ginger.

ingredients.name: Pickle Juice
ingredients.notes: from a jar of pickled ginger

instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork chops and sear for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer skillet to oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until pork reaches 145°F (63°C).
While pork is cooking, mix smokejoy, miso paste, pickle juice, ginger, soy sauce, and honey in a small bowl until smooth.
Brush glaze over pork chops during last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove pork from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve pork chops with additional glaze spooned over the top and a side of pickled ginger.
